claim_card.claim: The major social risk of intuition-capable AI is not genuine divinity, but sacralization: humans may project authority, reverence, or quasi-divine status onto effective ordering systems they cannot fully articulate.
claim_card.test_hook: Study user populations interacting with increasingly context-sensitive systems; measure authority projection, deference, and mythologizing responses as capability rises.

source.locator: p1 Abstract; p5–6 Section IV; p7 Thesis 5
